headline: The Margot Hotel Debuts in San Diego's Gaslamp Quarter as One of the First Hotels in Outset Collection by Hilton
summary: LONG BEACH, Calif. - A new kind of boutique hotel experience has arrived in downtown San Diego. The Margot Hotel officially opens today in the Gaslamp Quarter, marking its debut as one of the first...

headline: Lyft CEO David Risher on Q1 results: Our 'best financial quarter ever'
summary: Lyft CEO David Risher joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the company's quarterly earnings results, state of the consumer, and more.
